g.text: LLM workflow OS — phase transitions as a constrained decision
reyn runs LLM workflows as a state machine. Phases are statel
a Skill defines the graph and the final output schema; the OS
execution. The LLM's role is reduced to choosing among OS-pro
and producing structured artifacts — never to inventing contr
